mapper.insert: insert into lyh_practice_record (user_id, question_id, answer_text, score, duration_sec, create_time, remark) values (#{userId}, #{questionId}, #{answerText}, #{score}, #{durationSec}, now(), #{remark})
mapper.select: select record_id, user_id, question_id, answer_text, score, duration_sec, remark, create_time from lyh_practice_record where user_id = #{userId} order by record_id desc
select record_id, user_id, question_id, answer_text, score, duration_sec, remark, create_time from lyh_practice_record where user_id = #{param1} and question_id = #{param2} order by record_id desc
